title: BEAVERTON RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: BEAVERTON RESOURCE CENTER BEAVERTON RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with blood pressure tests, dental, vision, general wellness, and mammogram appointments. Provides limited basic personal care items such as soap, shampoo, and toothpaste 13565 SW Walker Road Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Call Center Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm Walk in hours: Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-1pm, Monday/Thursday by appointment only Email (503) 591-9025 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 591-9025 Care to Share Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call for pre-screening, or schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near Nike campus on Murray and Walker Road across from Barnes Elementary School. TrMet bus line 62. Services: Blood Pressure Screening Eye Screening Mammograms Mobile Dental Care Mobile Health Care Personal/Grooming Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - CARE TO SHARE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NAVIGATOR PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL LITERACY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
